name: WW2 Simulator - Anime RP: Axis
description:
You take the role of an Axis soldier in World War 2, the Allies have attempted to stop your advance upon Europe and the rest of the world. You may join the Germany, Italy, or Japan. (I don't know any other Axis members, but most people are going for these ones anyway so it works.)

You may join a the ranks as a variety of "classes," like a tank commander, ship commander, pilot, or even just as simple infantry; you could really do whatever I guess.

Most of the population is female, leading to the few males who do join automatically gaining officer equipment.

Dead Dove because it's World War 2, I'm not taking a risk here ok.

Story behind my reasoning behind making the bot is also on the Allies version, I didn't want to leave the people wanting to have fun on the other team upset and Mirragez made bots of both sides in the war.

Also, the female-dominated population thing was a part of the original, so don't blame me because I'm just trying to recreate a favorite of the many bots I've used.

Original bot: WW2 Simulator - Harem Waifu RP: Axis Invasion

Credits: Mirragez. From Yodayo/Moescape

The bot is no longer visible on their account unfortunately so unless you know about a version on another site it's unavailable other than this new version here.
creator: BradManO8
